0.content:
# 🛒 End-to-End Ecommerce Journey Funnel

**Application:** [APP_NAME] (`APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX`) | **Data Source:** Gen 3 RUM (`user.events`) | **Funnel Type:** Session-based

Continuously validates the critical ecommerce booking journey to ensure successful transaction completion and consistent user experience.

| Funnel Step | Page / SPA Signal | Type |
|-------------|-------------------|------|
| **Homepage** | `/your-location/` | Page |
| **Places to Stay** | `/your-location/places-to-stay/*` | Page |
| **Bookings SPA** | `/your/bookings/` — SPA loads `api/packages/definitions` | SPA |
| **Select Dates** | SPA calls `api/seasons/getAll` | SPA API |
| **Choose Hotel** | SPA calls `api/hotel/list` | SPA API |
| **Select Room** | SPA calls `api/hotel/details` | SPA API |
| **Add Park Tickets** | SPA calls `api/masterdata/getAttractionsAvailabilityInfo` | SPA API |
| **Confirmation** | `/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/` | Page |

> **Note:** Steps 3–7 occur within a single-page React app at `/your/bookings/`. SPA steps are inferred from API calls made by the booking widget.

2.title: 🏠 Homepage Sessions
2.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your-location/"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

3.title: 🏨 Places to Stay Sessions
3.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter matchesValue(toString(page.url.path), "*/places-to-stay*")
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

4.title: 📅 Bookings SPA Sessions
4.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

5.title: ✅ Confirmation Sessions
5.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

6.title: 📊 Page-Level Funnel (Session Drop-Off)

7.title: 📉 Page-Level Conversion & Drop-Off Rates

8.query: data record(a="SPA Deep-Dive — Bookings Widget Steps (via API Calls)")

9.title: 🔍 SPA Funnel — Bookings Widget Step Progression

10.title: 📋 SPA Step Detail — Sessions & Drop-Off

12.title: 📈 Daily Funnel — Page-Level Steps Over Time

13.title: 📈 Daily Confirmation Rate (Conversions / Homepage Sessions %)
13.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your-location/" or page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
| fieldsAdd is_homepage = if(page.url.path == "/your-location/", 1, else: 0), is_confirmation = if(page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/", 1, else: 0)
| makeTimeseries homepage_views = sum(is_homepage), confirmation_views = sum(is_confirmation), interval:1d
| fieldsAdd conversion_rate = (confirmation_views[] / homepage_views[]) * 100

14.query: data record(a="Drop-Off Analysis — Where Do Users Abandon?")

15.title: 📱 Funnel by Device Type

16.title: ❌ Errors in Bookings SPA
16.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter matchesValue(toString(view.url.path), "*/bookings*")
| summarize error_count = count(), sessions_affected = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{error.name, error.type, error.source}
| sort error_count desc
| limit 15

17.title: ⏱️ Page Load Time per Funnel Step (P75 ms)

18.title: 📈 SPA API Performance Over Time (P75 ms)

19.title: 🌍 Funnel Conversion by Country (Top 10)
19.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your-location/" or page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
| fieldsAdd is_homepage = if(page.url.path == "/your-location/", dt.rum.session.id, else: null), is_confirmation = if(page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/", dt.rum.session.id, else: null)
| summarize homepage_sessions = countDistinct(is_homepage), confirmation_sessions = countDistinct(is_confirmation), by:{geo.country.iso_code}
| filter homepage_sessions > 50
| fieldsAdd conversion_pct = round((toDouble(confirmation_sessions) / toDouble(homepage_sessions)) * 100, decimals: 2)
| sort homepage_sessions desc
| limit 10

20.title: 📊 Places to Stay — Page Breakdown
20.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter matchesValue(toString(page.url.path), "*/places-to-stay*")
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), page_views = count(), by:{page.detected_name}
| sort sessions desc
| limit 15

21.title: 📊 Daily Confirmations
21.query:
fetch user.events, from:$dt_timeframe_from, to:$dt_timeframe_to
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "page_summary"
| filter page.url.path == "/your/bookings/thank-you-for-your-booking/"
| makeTimeseries confirmations = count(), interval:1d
